_doc: ERGSN buyer directory — vetted procurement / importer / distributor leads for cold outreach. Initial seed targets the DL Series shredder vertical (K-Security, GSA-friendly US fed contractors + commercial security distributors). Add new entries via scripts/discover-buyers/discover.js or Add-Buyer UI in the review tool. NEVER push outreach against an entry whose status is 'rejected' or 'unsubscribed'.
